description: Use this API to purge an individual flow constraint record of a three-winding transformer from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = purge_opf_brflw_3wt(eibus, ejbus, ekbus, cktid, bflwid)
python_syntax: ierr = purge_opf_brflw_3wt(eibus, ejbus, ekbus, cktid, bflwid)

parameters.name: eibus
parameters.description: From bus of the winding from which the flow constraint is being purged. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ejbus
parameters.description: To bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ekbus
parameters.description: Third bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: bflwid
parameters.description: Branch flow constraint identifier. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: specified three-winding transformer does not exist.
specified winding of three-winding transformer not found.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
